name: Koulibiac
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the puff pastry in half and roll out to form two rectangles large enough for a baking tray.
2. Place one rectangle on a greased baking tray.
3. Preheat the oven to 210°C (410°F).
4. Drain the spinach and season with nutmeg to taste.
5. Drain and mash the salmon.
6. Mix the cooked rice with fresh cream, beaten egg, and lemon juice. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Spread half of the rice mixture within 2 cm of the edge of the pastry.
8. Cover with half of the spinach, half of the mashed salmon, and hard-boiled eggs.
9. Cover with the remaining spinach, salmon, and rice.
10. Place the second rectangle of pastry over the top and seal the edges well.
11. Make a small cut in the center to allow steam to escape.
12. Bake in the center of the oven for 35-40 minutes until golden brown.
13. Serve hot or cold.
